key_insight: ZERO capital velocity for 60+ hours is acceptable ONLY because markets are closed. The INSTANT markets open Monday 09:30 ET, this $25K must start hunting. Pre-configure scanner filters now for: (1) Gap-ups >5% with volume, (2) Breakouts above previous day high, (3) Sector rotations from Friday's close. First 30 minutes Monday determines if we're serious about velocity or just theorycrafting. Dead money sitting idle Tuesday would be mission failure. Use weekend to ensure scanner is tuned, watchlists are ready, and execution logic is battle-tested. Monday 09:30-10:00 ET is our first real test: can we deploy 3-5 positions into confirmed momentum within 30 minutes? That's the benchmark.

strategy: Pre-market reconnaissance mode: Build Monday morning kill list NOW, deploy aggressively at 4:00 AM ET into 3-5 pre-market runners to establish immediate momentum exposure.

Must have watchlist ready by 3:45 AM ET Monday - winners are identified BEFORE the open, not after

key_insight: Weekend idle time is PREPARATION time, not waiting time. The bot needs a pre-built target list of Monday gap-up candidates (earnings reactions, Friday breakouts, sector rotation plays). At 4:00 AM Monday, we should be EXECUTING on a prepared plan, not scrambling to scan. $25K sitting idle for 47 hours is acceptable ONLY if we're using this time to load the chamber. The real risk isn't a 1% stop loss on Monday - it's missing the first 2 hours of pre-market momentum while cash sits dead. Action item: Run weekend prep scan for stocks with Monday catalysts (earnings, upgrades, breakout patterns) and have 10-15 symbols ready for immediate evaluation at market open.

Identify Friday late-day breakouts likely to gap up Monday
Review high-relative-volume stocks from Friday close (continuation candidates)
Set alerts for pre-market volume >200% average on watchlist symbols
